pi_items.source: Verified by reviewing setup_task.sh which copies the dataset to this path.
Task instruction explicitly requests saving the Jamovi file at this path.
Task instruction explicitly requests saving the text report at this path.
Calculated Pearson correlations in Python using the actual Exam Anxiety dataset. The true values correctly fall within the expected ranges and are statistically significant (p < 0.05).

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the real Exam Anxiety dataset (Field, 2013) located at /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/ExamAnxiety.csv. The true Pearson correlation values between the variables are: Exam-Anxiety (r = -0.441, p = 3.13e-06), Exam-Revise (r = 0.397, p = 3.34e-05), and Revise-Anxiety (r = -0.709, p = 5.11e-17). All three correlations are statistically significant at alpha=0.05. The agent must save its Jamovi analysis to /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/ExamAnxietyCorrelation.omv and write the report to /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/correlation_report.txt.
